content.content: Model known for being a host on Las De Video Rola. She is popular on Instagram with over 370,000 followers. She posted her first YouTube video to her channel on July 6, 2012. She has hosted shows for Monitor Latino. Her mother passed away when she was 28 years old. She posted aboutBarack ObamaandMichelle Obamato her Instagram in May 2017.
